'''Sinidic''' was the aide to [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] [[Drom Guldi]]. He was a nervous-looking [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with gray-blonde hair and a wrinkled face. He was killed by a [[Wampa/Legends|wampa]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
